nasb.text: You hypocrite, first take the log out of your own eye, and then you will see clearly to take the speck out of your brother’s eye.

esv.text: You hypocrite, first take the log out of your own eye, and then you will see clearly to take the speck out of your brother’s eye.

cnv.text: 偽君子啊！先除掉你眼中的梁木，才可以看得清楚，去除掉弟兄眼中的木屑。

ccb.text: 你这伪君子啊！要先除掉自己眼中的大梁，才能看得清楚，好清除弟兄眼中的小刺。

csbs.text: 你这伪善的人！先除掉你自己眼里的梁木，然后你才能看得清楚，好除掉你弟兄眼里的木屑。
